reference: Hello. I just read through your question. Typically, cold sores are caused by viruses that lie dormant in the body, sometimes even for years. If he got a cold sore, it is most likely because he has been exposed to cold sore viruses in the past, and not because he kissed you.
text: I just read through your question. Typically, cold sores are caused by viruses that lie dormant in the body, sometimes even for years. If he got a cold sore, it was most likely because he has been exposed to cold sore viruses in the past, not because he kissed you.
